summary: Backend: 6/6 tests PASS for active-bookings API, booking limit enforcement, and barber gender_specialization. Frontend: CRITICAL — ActiveBookingTracker component does NOT render on /salons page despite the logged-in customer having 1 active booking (confirmed via backend). 'Track My Token' button and greeting are completely missing from the salons page, matching user's reported issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Component does not render on /salons page. No greeting, no 'Track My Token' button, data-testid='active-booking-tracker' not found in DOM. Customer has 1 confirmed active booking (booking-limit API rejects new self-booking with 'You already have an active booking for yourself today'). Component is likely failing to read the correct phone from user context/localStorage, or its conditional render hides it unexpectedly.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend does not call /api/customers/{phone}/active-bookings after login OR the response is not displayed. Backend endpoint is working and returns enriched data with salon_details. Verify phone normalization and user context wiring in ActiveBookingTracker.js. Check console: only geolocation errors, no component-level console.log despite E1 adding extensive logging — suggests the component never mounts or is not imported on SalonSelectionPage.

action_items: Fix ActiveBookingTracker not rendering on /salons — verify: (1) component is actually imported/mounted in SalonSelectionPage.js, (2) phone number is read from user context/localStorage and normalized with +91 prefix before calling /api/customers/{phone}/active-bookings, (3) the count>0 conditional is correct, (4) add console.log on mount to confirm, (5) add data-testid='active-booking-tracker' on root element
Could NOT validate Reschedule dialog, Queue Velocity Chart, or Token Detail page large display because entry point (Track My Token button) is absent. Retest required after fix.
Barber gender badge visibility in booking flow not validated via UI (blocked by same flow). Backend confirms gender_specialization field is present and updatable.
critical_code_review_comments: ActiveBookingTracker.js — suspected not being mounted on /salons or phone lookup mismatch. Verify SalonSelectionPage.js imports and renders <ActiveBookingTracker /> near top of JSX.
Recommend adding explicit data-testid='active-booking-tracker' and data-testid='track-my-token-btn' to aid automated verification.
Backend /api/customers/{phone}/active-bookings correctly normalizes phone and enriches with salon_details — works as designed.

success_rate.frontend: Blocked — core ActiveBookingTracker feature not rendering

test_credentials: Customer login flow on /login is signup-style (name + phone + gender); used Test User / 7503070727 / Men. Salon admin: +917503070727 / salon123.
seed_data_creation: None — existing active booking for +917503070727 used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend verified: /api/customers/+917503070727/active-bookings returns bookings with salon_details enrichment and no _id leak. Booking limit API correctly returns 400 'You already have an active booking for yourself today' when self-booking is attempted a second time. Barber gender_specialization PUT works when authenticated via /api/salon/password-login (access_token Bearer). Frontend blocker: ActiveBookingTracker does not render on /salons after customer /login signup — verify component mount, phone context, and conditional render. Once fixed, retest: Track My Token → Token Detail (8xl number, progress bar, Share/Reschedule/Cancel) → Reschedule dialog (date picker +1..+30 days, shift selector) → Queue Velocity Chart → gender badges on barber cards in SinglePageBooking.
rca_of_the_issue: ActiveBookingTracker invisible on /salons. Reproduction: 1) Go to /login (https://role-guard-system.preview.emergentagent.com/login), 2) Fill name 'Test User', phone '7503070727', select 'Men', click Continue — redirected to /salons with 'Welcome to SalonHub!' toast, 3) DOM inspect shows no [data-testid='active-booking-tracker'], no 'Track My Token' text, no greeting. Backend returns valid data for that phone. Likely cause: either ActiveBookingTracker is not imported/mounted in SalonSelectionPage.js, or user phone from login context is not passed/normalized correctly, or a silent exception prevents render. Mitigation: open SalonSelectionPage.js and verify <ActiveBookingTracker userPhone={...} /> is rendered above the salon list; add console.log on mount and API call; ensure phone is prefixed with +91.
